duplicateQueries: Majestic Flora Nectar A delicate necklace featuring a hand-set multicolor floral crystal pendant on a fine 18-inch chain. Each petal is individually set with a different pastel crystal for a garden-fresh effect.
Golden Sphere Huggies Chunky dome huggie earrings with a polished gold finish. The satisfying weight and close-fitting design make these an everyday essential that elevates any look.
Amber Lace Earrings Intricate textured filigree drop earrings inspired by antique lace patterns. The warm gold tone catches the light at every angle, creating a romantic, heirloom-quality effect.

Royal Heirloom Set A curated gift-boxed set pairing our signature stud earrings with a matching pendant necklace. Presented in a luxe velvet box with a handwritten gift card — the perfect gift for someone special.
